candidates.rationale: pa- is a common Tamil personal name medial element. Frequent in Sangam TB personal names (pa-raN, pa-ya-na). 100% medial in Dravidian corpus. [P364=or?][pa][P385=suffix] = 'Or-pa-suffix' plausible name formula.
ca/cha — common Sangam Tamil personal name element. ca-taN, ca-vaN attested in Tamil-Brahmi inscriptions. MEDIAL consistent. No Parpola proposal conflicting.
ku — Dravidian root ku- appears in many personal names. ku-maN, ku-raN (Sangam TB). [P364=or?][ku][P385] = 'Or-ku-suffix' plausible.
ko = king. But ko is mostly INITIAL in our model (M099=kol/koḷ is TERMINAL). P122 being 100% MEDIAL makes ko less likely — but not impossible if ko appears as a medial element in compound names.
va — strong, Dravidian va-N personal name prefix/medial. va-taN, va-yaN attested. MEDIAL consistent.

verdict: P122 = 'pa' (CANDIDATE, DEDR 4265). Best supported by MEDIAL positional profile + DEDR personal name evidence. Requires SA calibration (Phase-229) to confirm.
